option.name: originalContent
option.value:
package com.techproject.harvestlink.ui.screens.order
import com.techproject.harvestlink.data.LocalOrderData import com.techproject.harvestlink.model.Order
data class OrderUiState( val orders: List<Order> = emptyList(), val showOrderDetails: Boolean = false, val selectedOrder: Order = LocalOrderData.sampleOrderData[0], )

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
package com.techproject.harvestlink.ui.screens.order
import com.techproject.harvestlink.data.LocalOrderData import com.techproject.harvestlink.model.Order
data class OrderUiState( val orders: List<Order> = emptyList(), val showOrderDetails: Boolean = false, val selectedOrder: Order? = null, )
